أيها الساهرون، استعدوا لكتابة مجدكم الخاص في عالم مليء بالرمال الذهبية، السحر القديم، والبطولات اللانهائية.

title: Top War: Battle Game
notes:
Patch Notes
[Optimization] Updated Alliance-related feature names: [Combat Order] has been renamed to [Alliance Announcement], and the original [Alliance Announcement] is now [Alliance Declaration].
[Optimization] Added a filtering feature to the Skill Bank.
[New] Added the ability to comment, like, and insert coordinates in Alliance Announcements (available in select Warzones).
[New] Added an image insertion feature to Alliance Announcements (available in select Warzones).

title: King's Choice
notes:
[What's New]
1. New Event - Celestial Map: Come participate in the new mini-game - Celestial Map, launch Orbs, break Star Map targets, and earn special event rewards.
2. Lovers: Added the 'Incomparable Love' Intimacy Status for the following Lovers: Merlin, Bradamante.
[Optimizations]
1. Royal War:
a. The Rebel Battlefield in the server is now unlocked by default, and soldiers can be dispatched to the Rebel Battlefield at any time. Unlock and dispatch requirements for Cross-server events remain

title: Dakesh Plus
notes: Improve gaming experience, improve game performance.

title: The Wolf: Animal Game MMORPG

title: Zynga Poker: Texas Holdem Game
notes:
NEW: Buddy Bonus! We’ve upgraded gifting. Having more buddies now means bigger rewards and massive multipliers every time you spin!
Turn up the heat with Miami Nights! Compete in our latest Watch Event for a chance to win an exclusive, limited-edition reward
Experience smoother gameplay with various bug fixes and performance improvements

title: Top Eleven Be Football Manager
notes: Managers, a new version of Top Eleven is here, so get your clubs ready! We've fixed a few bugs and tweaked some features to improve your playing experience. Download this new version and enjoy Top Eleven!

title: King Of Steering - Hajwala
notes: New improvements to ensure game stability and a fix for the VIP subscription issue encountered by some players.

title: Truck Star
notes:
Ready for an exciting update?

- 100 new levels packed with thrilling challenges!
- Repair and upgrade the brand-new motorcycle [Lord of the Shadows]!
- The new limited-time vehicle modding event [Sir Clockwork] is coming soon!
- The new limited-time treasure hunt event [Treasure Quest] is coming soon!

Even more fun content is now live in the game—log in and check it out!

title: Project Makeover
